# mixpanel_dataset (Resource)

Manages a Mixpanel dataset.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mixpanel_dataset" "events" {
  dataset_id  = "my_dataset"
  name        = "My Dataset"
  description = "Events dataset managed by Terraform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `dataset_id` (String)
- `project_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `dataset_secrets` (Attributes List)
